innateAbility.name: Inner Peace
innateAbility.description: Grants bonus health regeneration and bonus mana regeneration as long as Lanaya remains still.The bonus regeneration values winds-up linearly from nil to its max value.

abilities.name: Refraction
abilities.description: Grants all damage barrier instances that negates damage.Both the damage negation component and the bonus attack damage component have a limited number of instances and are independent of each other.

abilities.name: Meld
abilities.description: Conceals herself, becoming invisible as long as she remains still.

abilities.name: Psi Blades
abilities.description: Attacks slice through the attacked unit, spilling and damaging enemy units reduced by a percentage per unit behind it.

abilities.name: Psionic Projection
abilities.description: Teleports Lanaya to the nearest Psionic Trap after channeling and detonates it upon arrival, damaging, silencing, and slowing enemy units around it.

abilities.name: Psionic Trap
abilities.description: Places mystical traps that invisibly monitor enemy movements.

abilities.name: Trap
abilities.description: When sprung at Lanaya's command, the traps apply a movement speed slow based on the charged-up time.Only deals damage over time if the trap is fully charged.
